message.content: Read all the SDUI adapter files in /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/sdui/adapters/ to understand what props each adapter expects. input.description: Find all TypeScript/TSX files in adapters directory

content.text: Now I'll read all the individual adapter files:

Perfect. Here's a comprehensive summary of all SDUI adapter files and their expected props structures:

## SDUI Adapter Props Structures

### 1. **HeadingAdapter**
**File:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/sdui/adapters/HeadingAdapter.tsx`

**Props Interface:**
```typescript
interface HeadingProps extends SDUIComponentProps {
  text: string;                              // Required
  color?: string;                            // Default: 'INTENSE_COLOR_05'
  mt?: string;                               // Margin top
  mb?: string;                               // Margin bottom
  align?: string;                            // Text alignment
  testID?: string;                           // Testing identifier
}
```

---

### 2. **TextAdapter**
**File:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/sdui/adapters/TextAdapter.tsx`

**Props Interface:**
```typescript
interface TextProps extends SDUIComponentProps {
  text: string;                              // Required
  type?: string;                             // Default: 'bodyMD'
  color?: string;                            // Optional color
  colorBold?: string;                        // Optional bold color
  mt?: string;                               // Margin top
  mb?: string;                               // Margin bottom
  mr?: string;                               // Margin right
  ml?: string;                               // Margin left
  align?: string;                            // Text alignment
  underline?: boolean;                       // Underline text
  testID?: string;                           // Testing identifier
}
```

---

### 3. **BalanceDisplayAdapter**
**File:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/sdui/adapters/BalanceDisplayAdapter.tsx`

**Props Interface:**
```typescript
interface BalanceDisplayProps extends SDUIComponentProps {
  label: string;                             // Required - label text
  pointsFormatted: string;                   // Required - formatted points display
  priceFormatted: string;                    // Required - formatted price in parentheses
  mt?: string;                               // Default: 'nano'
  mb?: string;                               // Default: 'smaller'
}
```

---

### 4. **PointsInputAdapter**
**File:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/sdui/adapters/PointsInputAdapter.tsx`

**Props Interface:**
```typescript
interface PointsInputProps extends SDUIComponentProps {
  label: string;                             // Required
  placeholder?: string;                      // Default: '0'
  keyboardType?: string;                     // Default: 'number-pad'
  textRight?: string;                        // Optional right-side text
  textError?: string;                        // Optional error message
  mb?: string;                               // Margin bottom
  contextKey?: string;                       // Key for storing value in context
}
```

---

### 5. **ButtonAdapter**
**File:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/sdui/adapters/ButtonAdapter.tsx`

**Props Interface:**
```typescript
interface ButtonProps extends SDUIComponentProps {
  text: string;                              // Required
  disabled?: boolean;                        // Optional, defaults to false
  mt?: string;                               // Margin top
  mb?: string;                               // Margin bottom
  icon?: string;                             // Optional icon name
  isLoading?: boolean;                       // Optional loading state
  testID?: string;                           // Testing identifier
}
```

---

### 6. **LinkAdapter**
**File:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/sdui/adapters/LinkAdapter.tsx`

```typescript
  mt?: string;                               // Margin top

}
```

---

### 7. **AlertAdapter**
**File:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/sdui/adapters/AlertAdapter.tsx`

**Props Interface:**
```typescript
interface AlertProps extends SDUIComponentProps {
  label: string;                             // Required
  type?: string;                             // Default: 'highlight'
  icon?: string;                             // Optional icon name
```

### 8. **ListTextIconAdapter**
**File:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/sdui/adapters/ListTextIconAdapter.tsx`

**Props Interface:**
```typescript
interface ListTextIconProps extends SDUIComponentProps {
  items: ListTextIconItem[];                 // Required array of items
  type?: string;                             // Default: 'list'
  ml?: string;                               // Margin left
  mr?: string;                               // Margin right
  mb?: string;                               // Margin bottom
}

// Item structure:
interface ListTextIconItem {
  icon: string;                              // Required icon name
  iconColor?: string;                        // Optional icon color
  iconColorShape?: string;                   // Optional icon shape background color
  description: string;                       // Required description text
  hasBackgroundIcon?: boolean;               // Optional background flag
}
```

---

### 9. **SeparatorAdapter**
**File:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/sdui/adapters/SeparatorAdapter.tsx`

**Props Interface:**
```typescript
interface SeparatorProps extends SDUIComponentProps {
  bgColor?: string;                          // Default: 'BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02'
  height?: number;                           // Default: 1
  width?: string;                            // Default: '100%'
  mt?: string;                               // Margin top
  mb?: string;                               // Default: 'xxs'
}
```

---

### 10. **IconTextRowAdapter**
**File:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/sdui/adapters/IconTextRowAdapter.tsx`

**Props Interface:**
```typescript
interface IconTextRowProps extends SDUIComponentProps {
  icon: string;                              // Required icon name
  iconColor?: string;                        // Default: 'BRAND_BASE_01'
  iconSize?: string;                         // Default: 'sm'
  text: string;                              // Required text
  textType?: string;                         // Default: 'bodyMD'
  textColor?: string;                        // Optional text color
  mb?: string;                               // Margin bottom
}
```

---

### 11. **SectionHeadingAdapter**
**File:** `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/sdui/adapters/SectionHeadingAdapter.tsx`

**Props Interface:**
```typescript
interface SectionHeadingProps extends SDUIComponentProps {
  text: string;                              // Required
  color?: string;                            // Default: 'BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01'
  mt?: string;                               // Margin top
  mb?: string;                               // Default: 'smaller'
  align?: string;                            // Text alignment
}
```

---

## Key Observations

- All adapters extend `SDUIComponentProps` and receive a `context: SDUIContext` parameter
- Spacing props (`mt`, `mb`, `ml`, `mr`) follow a consistent pattern across adapters, accepting string values (design system tokens)
- Color props default to design system color tokens (INTENSE_COLOR_05, BRAND_BASE_01, etc.)
- Text content adapters (Heading, Text, SectionHeading) support typography properties
- Interactive components (Button, Link) have placeholder `onPress` handlers
- PointsInputAdapter has `contextKey` for state persistence but implementation is incomplete
